result.analysis: MAIN AGENT REPORT: Krasnodar at home in Krasnodar Stadium. Both teams in top form in RPL. Key battles: Cordoba vs Marichal, Spertsyan creativity vs Dinamo midfield. Russian Cup often sees tight knockout matches. Home crowd could push Krasnodar over the line.
result.bet: Draw @ 3.50 + Krasnodar to qualify. BTTS likely.
